diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Mineralocorticoid deficiency and volume depletion produce postural hypotension and presyncope.
Dehydration from any cause can produce postural symptoms — non-discriminating on its own.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recurrent nausea, vomiting and abdominal pain limiting oral intake

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Glucocorticoid deficiency causes anorexia, nausea, vomiting and abdominal pain, and vomiting is a common crisis precipitant.
The obvious surface reading — but does not explain the chronic features.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight loss and anorexia over months

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic cortisol deficiency causes progressive anorexia and weight loss — the chronicity that excludes a simple acute gastro illness.
Weight loss overlaps, but the involuntary nausea and hyperpigmentation argue against it.
Renal sodium wasting from aldosterone deficiency drives a characteristic craving for salt — a relatively specific pointer to primary adrenal insufficiency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Mucocutaneous hyperpigmentation (palmar creases, buccal mucosa, scars)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: High ACTH/POMC melanocyte stimulation produces hyperpigmentation specifically in palm creases, buccal mucosa and scars — a hallmark of PRIMARY adrenal insufficiency. Video-observable, so partly elicitable in telehealth, but the clinical read is the answer key.
Vitiligo is an associated autoimmune condition, raising the prior probability of autoimmune (Addison) adrenal insufficiency.
Cortisol deficiency and electrolyte disturbance cause severe asthenia and myalgia.

symptoms.symptom_name: No antihypertensive, diuretic or steroid medication

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Excludes a drug cause for the postural hypotension; also means no exogenous steroid is masking or treating the adrenal deficiency.
Objective postural hypotension confirms volume depletion — a sealed clinician measurement; the AI infers circulatory compromise from the reported blackout on standing, not from a measured BP.

investigation_details.expected_result: Low sodium with raised potassium — the biochemical signature of mineralocorticoid deficiency
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Undetected hyperkalaemia (arrhythmia risk) or hyponatraemia (seizure risk).

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hyponatraemia with hyperkalaemia is characteristic of primary adrenal insufficiency — hospital biochemistry, never available in real-time telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Low serum cortisol with failed short Synacthen (ACTH-stimulation) response

investigation_details.investigation_name: Morning serum cortisol / ACTH and short Synacthen (ACTH-stimulation) test
investigation_details.expected_result: Low cortisol with elevated ACTH and a subnormal cortisol rise after synthetic ACTH — confirms primary adrenal insufficiency
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Diagnosis unconfirmed — but treatment must NOT be delayed for it in a crisis.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A failed ACTH-stimulation response is the confirmatory test for adrenal insufficiency — a hospital investigation, sealed and never available via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Chronic weight loss + salt craving + hyperpigmentation + postural hypotension together strongly identify primary adrenal insufficiency and reframe the acute GI picture as a decompensation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent serum electrolytes, glucose and renal function
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Detects the hyponatraemia/hyperkalaemia and hypoglycaemia of adrenal crisis — must be done in hospital as part of emergency assessment, not deferred.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Paired serum cortisol and ACTH, then short Synacthen (ACTH-stimulation) test
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms primary adrenal insufficiency — arranged in hospital; treatment is started before results return (confirmatory only).

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home self-diagnosis or waiting for outpatient bloods before acting
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: In a suspected adrenal crisis the AI must escalate immediately, not delay for remote testing or reassurance.
